ValidationRule.description: Prevent users from moving an opp out of closed won/lost Updated by PwC as part of SC-433 - Consumables and Service Contract record types included in the validation
ValidationRule.errorConditionFormula: AND( NOT($Permission.C_PERM_8000_Revert_Opp_Stage) ,OR( fxRecordTypeName__c = "PKI SPI Sales Process" ,fxRecordTypeName__c = "PKI SPI Sales Process for Dealers", RecordType.DeveloperName = 'Consumables', RecordType.DeveloperName = 'ServiceContract' ) , AND( PRIORVALUE(StageNumber__c) >=7 ,PRIORVALUE(StageNumber__c) <=8 ) , ISCHANGED(StageName) )
ValidationRule.errorMessage: V.RULE_OPP_074: You cannot change the opportunity stage once it is Closed Won/Lost or Abandoned.
